ocr_findings.description: The three relationship-type notation examples in the image show actual line/arrow symbols inside the quotes: 1対1「──」, 1対多「──→」, 多対多「←──→」. The OCR renders these as empty quotes: '「 」', losing all three arrow/line symbols. A reader cannot see what the E-R diagram notation looks like.

The decorative lesson intro illustration (person overwhelmed with paperwork) and the intro callout box image are replaced by '![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)'. The callout box text ('役所での手続は面倒 / 役所での手続を面倒だと感じた経験はありませんか？...') is however captured in OCR as a heading and paragraph.

reviewer_notes: Content page for Lesson 13-03 データベース設計, covering E-R図 and introducing エンティティ/リレーションシップ concepts. The entity/relationship table is correctly captured. The three relationship multiplicity notations (1対1, 1対多, 多対多) lose their line/arrow symbols in OCR, which is a med-severity loss since those symbols are part of the definition being taught. All prose text is otherwise accurate.
